column1: # This file defines search queries to evaluate WITHOUT expected chunk IDs.
# need to list expected pages or chunk IDs.
#   query                  (required) The search term/phrase/sentence to run.
#   acceptable_terms       (optional) Pipe-separated synonyms/related terms. A result
#                          is counted relevant by the keyword judge if the query OR any
#   query_type             (optional) keyword | phrase | sentence. If blank
#   category               (optional) medical | date | person | general. Used for
#   notes                  (optional) Free-text note for humans; ignored by the evaluator.
# - Use a pipe (|) to separate acceptable_terms so commas can appear within a term.
when was the patient first assessed
